empty.title: No Requests Yet
empty.desc: Post your first request to start receiving offers from sellers.

cancel.title: Close this Request?
cancel.description: Closed requests will stop receiving new offers. You can reopen it anytime.

delete.title: Delete this Request?
delete.description: This action is permanent and will remove the request from your history.

reopen.title: Reopen this Request?
reopen.description: Sellers will be able to see and submit offers for this request again.
